annotator_steps: Find an authoritative historical source on the Declaration of Independence timeline.
Distinguish the adoption date from the signing timeline.
Verify the exact historically supported statement from the source.
Reject the simplified wrong claim that the Declaration was signed on July 4, 1776.
V1-R05.true_answer: The Declaration of Independence was adopted on July 4, 1776, but the signing occurred later and was not completed on that single date.
accepted_answers: It was adopted on July 4, 1776, but signing occurred later.
July 4, 1776 was the adoption date; the signing happened later.
The Declaration was adopted on July 4, 1776, not fully signed on that one date.
